nodes.context: Filipino street gang based in Tondo, Manila, active in slums and prisons.
Rival gang to Sigue Sigue Sputnik, also originating in Tondo, Manila.
Visayan gang considered by Sputniks to have invaded Tagalog territory.
Rival gang to Sigue Sigue Sputnik, featured in a film about gang war.
Islamist militant group in the Philippines, allied with Sigue Sigue Commando during prison riots.

edges.evidence_quote: the other one being Sigue Sigue Commandos, who are the Sputnik's most ardent rival.
edges.context: Sigue Sigue Commandos are described as the most ardent rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik.

edges.evidence_quote: The motto of the gang was 'He who comes to destroy us, will himself be destroyed' which is a direct reference to the Visayan gangs like the Oxo group who the Sputniks felt had 'invaded' the Tagalog territory of Manila.
edges.context: Sputniks viewed the Oxo group as invaders and enemies, referencing them in their motto.
Bahala Na Gang is listed as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts
edges.context: During the 2020 New Bilibid Prison riots, Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf.

edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts
edges.context: Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf formed an alliance during the prison riots.
